description: batch 2^17 + device_batch 64 (even more steps + half VRAM)
depth 12->16 (too big to converge in 5 min)
MLP ratio 4x->3x (less capacity hurts more than extra steps help)
window pattern SSSL->SL (more long-range but slower)
FINAL_LR_FRAC 0.0->0.1 (full decay to zero is better)
remove value embeddings (they help despite the cost)
HEAD_DIM 128->64 (12 heads worse than 6 larger heads)
embedding LR 0.6->0.4 (0.6 is the sweet spot)
z-loss 1e-4 regularizer (softcap already handles logit scale)
Adam beta2 0.95->0.99 (0.95 is better for short training)
warmdown ratio 0.5->0.6 (0.5 is the sweet spot)
ASPECT_RATIO 64->72 (wider but fewer steps in 5 min)
Muon beta2 0.95->0.99 (0.95 better for short training)
gradient clipping max_norm=1.0 (Muon doesn't need it)
remove softcap (logits need capping for stability)
resid_lambdas LR 10x higher (too much residual adaptation)
matrix LR 0.08->0.07 (0.08 is still the sweet spot)
Adam beta1 0.8->0.7 (0.8 is the sweet spot)
Muon momentum warmup target 0.95->0.98 (too much momentum)
window pattern SSSL->SSSSL (less long-range attention hurts)
remove Muon momentum warmup (warmup is helpful)
2% LR warmup (no warmup is still best)
all full-context layers L (slower per step)
GQA n_kv_head=3 (still not worth the capacity loss)
cosine LR schedule (flat+linear warmdown is better)
Muon ns_steps 5->4 (precision matters more than speed)
embedding init std 1.0->0.5 (default init is better)
remove x0 residual (it helps model quality)
attention dropout 0.05 (short training doesn't need regularization)
MLP 5x expansion (too many params per step)
short_window seq/4 (faster but loses too much context)
